observations: Opening pass: recast Jandice's threshold beat from flat label-fragments into Jaina's live read of respect, pride, and disappointment so the chapter stays in close Jaina perception instead of note-like shorthand.
Mechanism pass: changed 'The structure said them' to 'The pattern made them obvious' so the narration stays in Jaina's scholarly eye rather than sliding into loose authorial phrasing.

Kel'Thuzad voice pass: replaced the abstract-modern line 'Intelligence is morally inert... context... different economy' with language closer to a Kirin Tor lecturer speaking about hands, method, attachment, and severed bonds.
Mirror pass: changed 'Your field dead preserve function' to 'Your village dead preserve function' so Kel'Thuzad sounds like he is discussing this atrocity's actual scale, not filing a report.
Late-room pass: changed 'The compliment landed like contamination' to 'The compliment fouled the air' to keep the disgust bodily and immediate rather than neat.
Approach pass: changed 'locked geometry' to 'ward locks' so the closing pages stay in world-native magical diction instead of drifting toward planning vocabulary.
examples: Jandice's dismissal now reads as Jaina interpreting posture and tone, not the narrator declaring emotion from above.
Kel'Thuzad's lecture stays chalkboard-occult rather than essay-philosophical in the late mirror exchange.
The village/selfhood distinction now sounds like one mind wrote it all the way through.
The post-comprehension room inventory remains concrete and physical: tea, ink, chair, sleeve, dust.
The last page now speaks in wards, pulses, and descent rather than abstractions.

observations: Threshold pass: softened Jaina's read of Jandice from categorical interior-state naming into observed inference.

Mirror pass: changed the late appetite beat from a flat omniscient claim into 'She could see, at last, how badly he had wanted that question itself,' which keeps it rooted in what Jaina reads from his slip in composure.
Absence pass: reworked the 'someone else in the room' reflections so Jaina feels missing corrective pressure without the narration stepping outside her to summarize the whole partnership arc.
Namedrop pass: reduced Jaina's immediate Burning Legion reaction to institutional inference rather than full prior lore certainty, keeping her inside the knowledge ledger.
Final beat pass: replaced explanatory forecast about the next chapter's misread with what Jaina can actually fear in the moment—the visible aftermath an arriving witness will see.
examples: Jaina reads Jandice's bow; the prose does not certify Jandice's whole mind.
Kel'Thuzad's slips are read off face, tone, and timing, not omnisciently diagnosed.
The Lich King / Burning Legion beat stays at strategic shock, not lore-recital comfort.
The 'missing friction' beat remains Jaina's active realization, not a narrator thesis.
The close ends on what reaches Jaina through wards and body, then the name.

notes: Jaina's chapter10 knowledge holds: she begins with resonance, partial host-body theory, Barov / Scholomance live infrastructure, and no full waking sequence yet.
Kel'Thuzad remains alive, calm, human, and scholarly throughout, matching the chapter plan and memory ledger.
Jandice remains threshold-only in the sanctum and does not sit in on the main exchange, preserving chapter10's handoff logic.
Scholomance stays anti-Dalaran rather than fresh gothic spectacle: chalk, wards, salts, old stone, academic order turned wrong.
The absent-corrective thread remains a continuation of chapter9-11's split rather than a reset of the relationship.
observations: Verified names and titles: Jaina, Kel'Thuzad, Jandice, Antonidas, the Lich King, the Burning Legion.
Verified Jaina's physical continuity: chalk, strain, field wear, unreliable legs after the comprehension shock, all consistent with the ledger.

Verified plague-mechanism continuity: carrier shell, host conditioning, resonance completion, and the new distinction between crude recurrence and preserved selfhood all evolve prior evidence rather than contradict it.
Verified chapter11 parallel-time continuity: Sylvanas remains outside the room until the final approach registers through the wards.
Verified Antonidas continuity: present only through notation, memory, and the stone-line aftermath, never as a live third participant.

Mechanism pages: kept the fragment runs that feel like chalkboard notation, but broke several flat declarative chains with one longer sentence when the prose needed to carry consequence instead of inventory.
Replaced the late abstract line 'The compliment landed like contamination' with a shorter physical sentence that lands harder and varies the cadence around it.
Clarified the comprehension-shock ward beat so the chair-strike, ward-shiver, and recoil land in a cleaner sequence instead of stumbling through duplicated emphasis.
Smoothed the absence paragraph after Kel'Thuzad's 'partner' line so the thought chain tightens instead of spreading into equal-weight clauses.
Tightened the namedrop aftermath by trimming one full explanatory paragraph into a faster institutional inference, which keeps the middle from going essay-flat.
Sharpened the final page by replacing one abstract sentence and one planner term with shorter, more physical beats built around wards, stair, pause, movement.
examples: The chapter still opens in clipped, hard-lit fragments, but the fragments now alternate more cleanly with fuller lines of realization.
Kel'Thuzad's long lecture bands are punctured by Jaina's blunt questions at the right points.
The comprehension shock now breaks on the desk, chair, and breath instead of on commentary.
The silence after the mirror beat now has clearer pulse and room-sound variation.
The final ward-descent sequence hits as a rising chain rather than a restart.

continuity.crossChapter: Verified against chapter10 and chapter11: chapter12 opens after the descent gap promised in chapter10, and its final ward-approach remains simultaneous with chapter11's northbound redirect rather than later recap.
observations: Opening handoff: Jandice remains at the threshold, exits immediately, and the sanctum opens already in progress, honoring the chapter bridge instead of replaying the descent.
Mechanism-to-ethics transition stays causal: once the theorem lands, Jaina forces the argument toward persons, consent, and civic violation rather than the scene simply 'moving on.'
Mirror-to-scale transition stays causal: Antonidas, the old ban, and the shared schooling create the opening for the higher chain-of-command revelation.
Comprehension-shock aftermath now flows into stillness and then into the outside disturbance without the false impression that the approach already started at the recoil beat.
The final approach now ends on recognition and imminent entry rather than explaining chapter13's misread in advance.
examples: The board-to-desk shift is the hinge from proof to argument, not a disconnected new topic.
The villages/selfhood distinction drives the mortality conversation; it is not restated as summary.
The Lich King namedrop widens the frame, and the Burning Legion namedrop widens it again without a dead-air pause.
The sanctum silence buys one beat of fallout before the wards answer the incoming movement.
The last line belongs to recognition, which is where the next chapter must take over.

observations: Cut the last visible planner-vocabulary residue in the close by replacing 'geometry' with 'ward locks.'
Removed the most thesis-like late-scene line about reading chapter13 wrong and replaced it with visible aftermath pressure instead.
Re-read the weakest three sections—the mirror beat, the namedrop aftermath, and the closing ward approach—and tightened each toward concrete physical detail.
Kept the room's banality as evidence rather than letting it harden back into commentary: tea, lamp, ink, chair, sleeve, copied pages.
Trimmed one recurrence of explicit partnership summary language so the chapter carries emotional residue without sounding like planning prose.
examples: The comprehension beat no longer confuses ward-reaction with outside arrival.
The closing dread is now carried by chair, chalk, stillness, and wards rather than epigrammatic commentary.
Kel'Thuzad's late abstraction is reduced to concrete speaker-logic instead of authorial gloss.
The Antonidas / Council reaction now stays in scene-bound strategic inference.
No fresh scene-opening cliché or biography clause was introduced while fixing the chapter.

observations: Kel'Thuzad's late philosophical register had drifted toward modern seminar language; replaced the stiffest phrasing with speech that still sounds exact but comes out of occult method and severed bonds rather than contemporary abstraction.
Changed 'Your field dead preserve function' to 'Your village dead preserve function' so the line sounds like a necromancer discussing what he built, not a briefing memo.
Checked Jaina's spoken lines against her voice sheet: she remains precise, humane, and fast, with no lab-report jargon added to her mouth.
Checked Kel'Thuzad's praise beats: 'Exactly,' 'There. Yes,' and the calm corrections stay collegial and ruinously measured rather than theatrical.
Checked the final exchange around the incoming approach: both speakers remain plain and immediate under pressure, with no institutional sludge.
examples: Kel'Thuzad now speaks of intelligence and method in terms a Kirin Tor dissident would plausibly say aloud.
Jaina's 'Do not mistake clarity for agreement' remains sharp without sounding modern-bureaucratic.
The recurrence/selfhood distinction stays occult-academic instead of medical-clinical.
The 'partner' exchange still wounds because it sounds spoken, not theorized.
The final 'Someone expected?' / silence / 'You know the approach' run stays natural in live dialogue.
